lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Salok, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੰਚ ਸਬਦ ਧੁਨਿਕਾਰ ਧੁਨਿ ਤਹ ਬਾਜੈ ਸਬਦੁ ਨੀਸਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: panch sabad dhunikaar dhun teh baajai sabad neesaan |
lines.english: The Panch Shabad, the Five Primal Sounds, resonate and resound within; the insignia of the Shabad is revealed there, vibrating gloriously.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਰ ਮਹਿ ਘਰੁ ਦੇਖਾਇ ਦੇਇ ਸੋ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਸੁਜਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: ghar meh ghar dekhaae dee so satigur purakh sujaan |
lines.english: The True Guru is the All-knowing Primal Being; He shows us our true home within the home of the self.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੀਪ ਲੋਅ ਪਾਤਾਲ ਤਹ ਖੰਡ ਮੰਡਲ ਹੈਰਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: deep loa paataal teh khandd manddal hairaan |
lines.english: Worlds and realms, nether regions, solar systems and galaxies are wondrously revealed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾਰ ਘੋਰ ਬਾਜਿੰਤ੍ਰ ਤਹ ਸਾਚਿ ਤਖਤਿ ਸੁਲਤਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: taar ghor baajintr teh saach takhat sulataan |
lines.english: The strings and the harps vibrate and resound; the true throne of the Lord is there.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਖਮਨ ਕੈ ਘਰਿ ਰਾਗੁ ਸੁਨਿ ਸੁੰਨਿ ਮੰਡਲਿ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sukhaman kai ghar raag sun sun manddal liv laae |
lines.english: Listen to the music of the home of the heart - Sukhmani, peace of mind. Lovingly tune in to His state of celestial ecstasy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਕਥ ਕਥਾ ਬੀਚਾਰੀਐ ਮਨਸਾ ਮਨਹਿ ਸਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: akath kathaa beechaareeai manasaa maneh samaae |
lines.english: Contemplate the Unspoken Speech, and the desires of the mind are dissolved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਜਪਾ ਜਾਪੁ ਨ ਵੀਸਰੈ ਆਦਿ ਜੁਗਾਦਿ ਸਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: ajapaa jaap na veesarai aad jugaad samaae |
lines.english: It does not forget the Chant which is chanted without chanting; it is immersed in the Primal Lord God of the ages.

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਲਟਿ ਕਮਲੁ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤਿ ਭਰਿਆ ਇਹੁ ਮਨੁ ਕਤਹੁ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: aulatt kamal amrit bhariaa ihu man katahu na jaae |
lines.english: The heart-lotus is turned upside-down, and is filled with Ambrosial Nectar. This mind does not go out; it does not get distracted.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦੁ ਖੋਜਿ ਇਹੁ ਘਰੁ ਲਹੈ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਤਾ ਕਾ ਦਾਸੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sabad khoj ihu ghar lahai naanak taa kaa daas |1|
lines.english: Nanak is the slave of that one who seeks the Shabad and finds this home within. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਿ ਸਖੀਆ ਪੰਚੇ ਮਿਲੇ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਿਜ ਘਰਿ ਵਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: sabh sakheea panche mile guramukh nij ghar vaas |
lines.english: All the sister-companions are blessed with the five virtues. The Gurmukhs dwell in the home of the self deep within.

lines.translit: mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਲੂਬਿ ਅਕਲ ਮਨ ਗੋਰ ਨ ਮਾਨੀ ॥
lines.translit: kaaloob akal man gor na maanee |
lines.english: My twisted mind does not believe that it will end up in a grave.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਿਲਿਮਿਲਿ ਬਿਸੀਆਰ ਦੁਨੀਆ ਫਾਨੀ ॥
lines.translit: chilimil biseeaar duneea faanee |
lines.english: The extravagant glamor of the world is a passing show.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕੁ ਚੀਜੁ ਮੁਝੈ ਦੇਹਿ ਅਵਰ ਜਹਰ ਚੀਜ ਨ ਭਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: ek cheej mujhai dehi avar jehar cheej na bhaaeaa |
lines.english: Please, bless me with the one thing; everything else is poison, and does not tempt me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਕਮੀਨ ਕਮਤਰੀਨ ਤੂ ਦਰੀਆਉ ਖੁਦਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: man kameen kamatareen too dareeaau khudaaeaa |
lines.english: I am meek and lowly; You are the great river.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੁਰਾਬ ਖਾਮ ਕੂਜੈ ਹਿਕਮਤਿ ਖੁਦਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: puraab khaam koojai hikamat khudaaeaa |
lines.english: You filled this fragile body with the water of life, O Lord, by Your Creative Power.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਤੁਆਨਾ ਤੂ ਕੁਦਰਤੀ ਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: man tuaanaa too kudaratee aaeaa |
lines.english: By Your Omnipotence, I have become powerful.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਗ ਨਾਨਕ ਦੀਬਾਨ ਮਸਤਾਨਾ ਨਿਤ ਚੜੈ ਸਵਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: sag naanak deebaan masataanaa nit charrai savaaeaa |
lines.english: Nanak is a dog in the Court of the Lord, intoxicated more and more, all the time.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ਨਵੀ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: paurree navee mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: New Pauree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਤਸ ਦੁਨੀਆ ਖੁਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਖੁਦਾਇਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: aatas duneea khunak naam khudaaeaa |2|
lines.english: The world is on fire; the Name of the Lord is cooling and soothing. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੋ ਵਰਤੈ ਚਲਤੁ ਚਲਤੁ ਵਖਾਣਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: sabho varatai chalat chalat vakhaaniaa |
lines.english: His wonderful play is all-pervading; it is wonderful and amazing!

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਥੇ ਸਭਿ ਵਿਕਾਰ ਸਬਦਿ ਨੀਸਾਣਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: lathe sabh vikaar sabad neesaaniaa |
lines.english: All my sins and corruption are washed away, through the insignia of the Shabad, the Word of God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਪਰਮੇਸਰੁ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਜਾਣਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: paarabraham paramesar guramukh jaaniaa |
lines.english: As Gurmukh, I know the the Transcendent Lord, the Supreme Lord God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਮਰਿ ਸਿਮਰਿ ਦਾਤਾਰੁ ਸਭਿ ਰੰਗ ਮਾਣਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: simar simar daataar sabh rang maaniaa |
lines.english: Meditating, meditating in remembrance on the Great Giver, I enjoy all comforts and pleasures.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧੂ ਸੰਗਿ ਉਧਾਰੁ ਭਏ ਨਿਕਾਣਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: saadhoo sang udhaar bhe nikaaniaa |
lines.english: In the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, one is saved, and becomes free.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਰਗਟੁ ਭਇਆ ਸੰਸਾਰਿ ਮਿਹਰ ਛਾਵਾਣਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: paragatt bheaa sansaar mihar chhaavaaniaa |
lines.english: I have become famous throughout the world, under the canopy of His kindness and grace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਲਏ ਮਿਲਾਇ ਖਸਮੈ ਭਾਣਿਆ ॥੨੭॥
lines.translit: naanak le milaae khasamai bhaaniaa |27|
lines.english: O Nanak, by the Pleasure of His Will, my Lord and Master has blended me with Himself. ||27||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਬਖਸਿ ਮਿਲਾਏ ਸਦ ਕੁਰਬਾਣਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: aape bakhas milaae sad kurabaaniaa |
lines.english: He Himself has forgiven me, and united me with Himself; I am forever a sacrifice to Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਨੁ ਲੇਖਾਰੀ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਜਿਨਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਲਿਖਾਇਆ ਸਚੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: dhan lekhaaree naanakaa jin naam likhaaeaa sach |1|
lines.english: Blessed is the writer, O Nanak, who writes the True Name. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Salok, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੰਨੁ ਸੁ ਕਾਗਦੁ ਕਲਮ ਧੰਨੁ ਧਨੁ ਭਾਂਡਾ ਧਨੁ ਮਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: dhan su kaagad kalam dhan dhan bhaanddaa dhan mas |
lines.english: Blessed is the paper, blessed is the pen, blessed is the inkwell, and blessed is the ink.

lines.translit: mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਪਟੀ ਕਲਮ ਆਪਿ ਉਪਰਿ ਲੇਖੁ ਭਿ ਤੂੰ ॥
lines.translit: aape pattee kalam aap upar lekh bhi toon |
lines.english: You Yourself are the writing tablet, and You Yourself are the pen. You are also what is written on it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂੰ ਆਪੇ ਆਪਿ ਵਰਤਦਾ ਆਪਿ ਬਣਤ ਬਣਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: toon aape aap varatadaa aap banat banaaee |
lines.english: You Yourself are all-pervading; You Yourself made the making.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕੋ ਕਹੀਐ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਦੂਜਾ ਕਾਹੇ ਕੂ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: eko kaheeai naanakaa doojaa kaahe koo |2|
lines.english: Speak of the One Lord, O Nanak; how could there be any other? ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰੀ ਗਤਿ ਮਿਤਿ ਤੂਹੈ ਜਾਣਦਾ ਤੁਧੁ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਪਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: teree gat mit toohai jaanadaa tudh keemat paaee |
lines.english: You alone know Your state and extent. Only You can estimate Your worth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਧੁ ਬਿਨੁ ਦੂਜਾ ਕੋ ਨਹੀ ਤੂ ਰਹਿਆ ਸਮਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: tudh bin doojaa ko nahee too rahiaa samaaee |
lines.english: Without You, there is no other at all; You are permeating and pervading everywhere.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਅਲਖ ਅਗੋਚਰੁ ਅਗਮੁ ਹੈ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਦਿਖਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: too alakh agochar agam hai guramat dikhaaee |
lines.english: You are invisible, imperceptible and inaccessible. You are revealed through the Guru's Teachings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਅਗਿਆਨੁ ਦੁਖੁ ਭਰਮੁ ਹੈ ਗੁਰ ਗਿਆਨਿ ਗਵਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: antar agiaan dukh bharam hai gur giaan gavaaee |
lines.english: Deep within, there is ignorance, suffering and doubt; through the spiritual wisdom of the Guru, they are eradicated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਕਰਤਾ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਅਗੰਮੁ ਹੈ ਰਵਿਆ ਸਭ ਠਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: too karataa purakh agam hai raviaa sabh tthaaee |
lines.english: You are the Creator, the Inaccessible Primal Lord God; You are all-pervading everywhere.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਕਰਹਿ ਤਿਸੁ ਮੇਲਿ ਲੈਹਿ ਸੋ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਈ ॥
lines.translit: jis kripaa kareh tis mel laihi so naam dhiaaee |
lines.english: He alone meditates on the Naam, whom You unite with Yourself, in Your Mercy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਤੁ ਤੂ ਲਾਇਹਿ ਸਚਿਆ ਤਿਤੁ ਕੋ ਲਗੈ ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਈ ॥੨੮॥੧॥ ਸੁਧੁ
lines.translit: jit too laaeihi sachiaa tith ko lagai naanak gun gaaee |28|1| sudh
lines.english: To whatever You link the mortal, O True Lord, to that he is linked. Nanak sings Your Glorious Praises. ||28||1|| Sudh||
